description: §21.3 — a relative import specifier (`import { present } from './m.scrml'`) with the sibling present is a legal specifier form; E-IMPORT-005 stays silent.
rationale: §21.3: relative `./` specifiers are one of the three legal forms (relative / `scrml:` / `vendor:`). A `./m.scrml` import must not fire E-IMPORT-005 — the clean twin of the bare-specifier case.
